economic_notes: Nation has significant investments in 13 Government Business Enterprises including Mikisew Commercial Trust, hotels, mechanical services, industrial supply, powerline investment, sport fishing etc. Agricultural Benefits Claim settled in 2018 for $135,972,938. Land claim settled in 1986 for $26,600,000 plus 24,000 acres reserve land. Oti-Nikan Community Trust established July 2020 for impact benefit agreements and land claim settlements.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - Chief and Council instructed management to exclude condensed financial information (assets, liabilities, revenues, expenses) of subsidiary business operations from Note 5. 13 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method with total investment of $69,847,828. Accumulated surplus includes $2,783,494 in accumulated remeasurement gains. Agricultural Benefits Claim member distributions payable of $32,161,103 is a significant liability (reduced from $49,116,470 as distributions are paid out). Land claims assets of $34,805,355 and Whachask Trust investments of $43,705,182 are significant financial assets. Total revenue of $44,262,365 excludes GBE earnings of $18,061,979 which are shown as other items below the operating surplus line. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, FNDF, Government of Alberta, CMHC, and ASETS transfers.
